sharedPost.text:
🌞 GAUTENG – READY TO ROCK THE BEACH? 🌊

We’re looking for bold, talented, and passionate performers — and this is YOUR chance to audition for Teen Beach Production! 🎭✨

Bring the music, the moves, and the magic to life in a high-energy stage adventure packed with unforgettable songs and performances.

It’s not just an audition — it’s your invite to be part of something exciting, to share the spotlight with other amazing performers, and to create memories that will last forever. 🌟

💌 Your audition pack is waiting! Email rykenprojects@gmail.com to claim it.
📍 Rehearsals & Casting in Gauteng
🎶 Shows in Cape Town – January 2026
💸 Production fee includes travel costs, accommodation in Cape Town, food outings, and more!
👥 Ages 16 – 24

⚡ The stage is set. The waves are calling. Now it’s YOUR time to shine!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — TV HOSTSNew Lifestyle & House Hunting Television Series
**LOS ANGELES BASED**

A major new lifestyle / house-hunting television series is now casting experienced on-camera hosts based in Los Angeles.

We are searching for a charismatic **male or female host**, aged approximately **30–45**, with a polished on-screen presence and strong television experience.

This is a professionally produced property and lifestyle series that will include:

* House hunting
* Property walkthroughs
* Lifestyle storytelling
* Some travel

We are looking for talent who can confidently connect with viewers while demonstrating genuine knowledge and passion for:

* Real estate
* Home design
* Architecture
* Lifestyle trends
* Luxury living

**IDEAL CANDIDATES WILL HAVE:**

* Proven experience hosting television programs or digital series
* Strong presenting and interviewing skills
* Professional, mature and glamorous on-camera presence
* Ability to improvise naturally on camera
* Excellent communication and storytelling ability
* Knowledge of property, interiors and home design
* Availability for one-day episode shoots

**PROJECT DETAILS:**

* Non-union
* Low per-episode hosting fee
* Each episode filmed in one shoot day
* Some travel may be required

**TO APPLY:**

Please email the following:

* Recent headshot/photos
* Resume or hosting credits
* Links to hosting reel or previous television work
* A short self-tape introducing yourself and explaining:
   * Your hosting experience
   * Your interest in property and home design
   * Why you would be perfect for this series

**SELF-TAPE GUIDELINES:**

Please keep your video under 2 minutes and film in a bright, quiet location.

If possible, include a short walkthrough of a stylish room, property, or home space while presenting to camera.

**SEND SUBMISSIONS TO:**

**Casting Director**

[info@abode-ent.com](mailto:info@abode-ent.com)  

Subject Line:

**HOUSE HUNTING HOST CASTING – YOUR NAME**

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

topComments.text: Hi Gary, can yoy please tell Approximate shooting dates? I have hosting relevant experience but going out of LA for a month. Want to apply if the actual shooting gonna be starting from 2nd week of July or later.
Interested

items.text:
Für einen Werbedreh in Stuttgart mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft suchen wir noch Komparsen im alter von 12-18 Jahren, Jungen und Mädchen, die gut bis sehr gut Fußball spielen können. 

Das ganze ist leider sehr Spontan und findet bereits morgen statt. 

Bei Interesse bitte direkt 1-2 Fotos mit schicken. 
Vielen Dank und vielleicht bis morgen.

topComments.text: Ich habe dir übrigens schon einmal in den Kommentaren bei einem ähnlichen Beitrag geschrieben, dass man dir leider keine DM schicken kann und auch keine E-Mail-Adresse für Bewerbungen angegeben ist.
Es gibt auch gar kein Hinweis über die Gage?!

items.text:
CVS Health Services Customers Testimonial Casting
[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)
* Has CVS had a significant, positive impact on your health / life?
* Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail?
* Have you benefited from any CVS health services such as pharmacy deliveries, Minute Clinic mental health services, women's health services, etc?
* Do you have a story of how CVS has helped you along your health journey?

If you answered "yes" to any of these questions, then we want to hear from you! *(All selected talent will be compensated.)*

CVS and Edelman are looking for real people across the country to share their stories on how the different CVS health services have played an important, emotional, or memorable role in their health journey. These empowering testimonial videos will share stories of how CVS, CVS Pharmacy, Signify Health, MinuteClinic, CVS Specialty Pharmacy, etc. have helped everyone from college students to caregivers to cancer survivors to people who just love CVS. Whether you shop at CVS regularly, have visited the MinuteClinic, relied on the Specialty Pharmacy, or benefited from preventive screenings offered at a CVS location - we want to hear from you. 

*Selected candidates will take part in a filmed interview in late May / early June, where they will discuss how CVS is a part of their life.*

**If you are interested in being considered for this project, please fill out our casting application at **[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)** or email us directly at casting@pairedupmedia.com**

If you answered "YES" to any of these questions, we want to hear from you! CASTING@PAIREDUPMEDIA.COM PAIRED + UP MEDIA'

AUDITION NOTICE !! - TRUE WEST
Playbox Productions is excited to announce:

**TRUE WEST**
**by Sam Shepard**

Directed by **Samuel G.C. Muñoz**

**IN-PERSON AUDITIONS:**
Sunday, June 14, 2026
Starting at 9:00AM

**LOCATION:**
2820 Smallman Street
Pittsburgh, PA 15222

**AUDITION REQUIREMENTS:**
• Prepare TWO contrasting 1-minute monologues (Dark comedy preferred)

Non Union Women, late 40's to mid 60's of Middle Eastern descent who have or can do an accent from the Middle Eastern region (Syrian, Turkish, Armenian, Lebanese, Iraqi, Kuwaiti, Iranian/Persian, Jordanian, Omani, Yemeni, Israeli, Palestinian, Egyptian, Qatari, Saudi) for a video that will be a part of a museum exhibit about work and culture. Shoots in early July and pays $500 for a half day (4-5 hours). To submit email your resume and current photo to submissions@asylumcasting.com!

items.text:
***Looking for a male actor under 4'9" for the leading role in an upcoming high school sports comedy student short film! No prior acting experience necessary.***

**Logline:** When a popular basketball star steals the one thing that made him special, a short-statured outsider joins the team to prove he can out-dunk the tallest kid in school.

**Genre: **Sports Comedy

**Length: **13-17 mins

**Estimated Shoot dates**: Minimum seven days, likely all in November 2026. 

**Location**: Denver or Aurora, CO

If you're interested, kindly email jakewunger@gmail.com with 2-3 pictures of yourself (one full body and one that clearly shows your face, no hat or sunglasses) as well as height measurements, and your resume if you'd like!

items.text:
In case you missed Season 6…check it out!  Make sure to follow Kick Ass Film Fest to stay up to date with our next Season. 

www.kickassfilmfest.com

sharedPost.text:
The official recap video is officially live! We want to extend a huge thank you to everyone who made this chapter of the Kick Ass Film Fest our best one yet. To our filmmakers, supporters, sponsors, family, and friends: thank you for your endless passion and dedication. We love seeing the immense growth of the Colorado film community and are incredibly excited for what the future holds.

A special thank you goes to Tyler Shown and David Armenta for their fantastic work behind the camera, filming the magic of the night and capturing our interviews. We also want to give a shout-out to the phenomenal team at Pueblo Memorial Hall for being so awesome and helping us keep the evening flowing flawlessly, as well as our kick-ass MC, Nova Meets, for keeping the crowd hyped from start to finish.

Check out the full recap video below! Plus, the excitement doesn't stop here—those red carpet interviews captured by Tyler and David will be rolling out throughout the summer, so be sure to follow us across all platforms to catch them as they drop.

www.kickassfilmfest.com

items.text:
Get your** EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT before May 31st**! 

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

>> **Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** 
>> **Organic Breathing & Image Work**
>> **Kutiyattam Traditional Theatre** (Kerala, India) 
>> **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> **The Actor’s Energy and Presence** 
>> **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷, **Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳, **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰, **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: **Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳, **Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮, **Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮, **Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭** Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

sharedPost.text:
We wanted to do something special for the extraordinary cast and crew that we had aboard. We hope you enjoy the footage.

We are so grateful for the expertise, love, and support from these fine individuals. There is no concept pilot without you. Seriously. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank You.

Some may not be pictured here, due to limited BTS, but every single person on this project was so critical to it's success. Rock on, everyone!

Don't get Addicted, Get Hooked!!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL for Child** **Actor**

Hello! We're looking for a young actor to join our re-creation of 'The Odyssey'! It's a musical feature to be posted on YouTube. This project is a continuation of my other productions, reaching over 800k views! 

*Project:*  'The Odyssey', based on 'EPIC: The Musical'. Specifically Circe's Island. 

*Producer:* Vega Cos Productions 

*Role:* Young girl, 4-7 yrs, playing a forest Nymph. No lines. Must be comfortable being held by strangers and looking nervous. No acting experience needed. 

*Date and Location:* June 12, likely 3 hours. Vancouver BC

*Pay:* Volunteer role with $50 honorarium

Please send head shot, demo reel and resume (if you have them) to lyra@vegacos.ca

topComments.text: Bonus points if she has naturally pointed ears? 😆

POWERHOUSE CASTING IS SEEKING FEMALE MARTIAL ARTISTS FOR A SODA COMMERCIAL SHOOTING IN URUGUAY, SOUTH AMERICA!

KARATE MASTER

Female. 30s–50s. Open Ethnicity.

We are looking for a fit, disciplined woman with real martial arts experience and strong physical coordination.

She should feel authentic performing karate chops, kicks, and sharp physical movements on camera — and fully commit to a powerful “HIYAHH!” while doing it.

COMPENSATION IF BOOKED & USED IN THE COMMERCIAL IS UPWARDS OF $6500.00 CAD PER PERSON

THIS IS A NON UNION JOB. IF YOU HAVE AN AGENT, PLEASE ASK THEM TO SUBMIT YOU OVER BREAKDOWNEXPRESS

THIS IS OPEN TO ALL CANADIAN RESIDENTS

***EVERYONE MUST HAVE A VALID PASSPORT WITH AT LEAST 6 MONTHS LEFT ON IT PRIOR TO EXPIRY***

IMPORTANT DATES:

• Callbacks: May 28, 2026 IN-PERSON IN TORONTO OR OVER ZOOM

• Shoot: June 9–11, 2026

• Location: Uruguay

• Travel Hold: June 5–13, 2026

***ALL FOOTAGE MUST BE SUBMITTED NO LATER THAN MONDAY, MAY 25TH @ 9:00AM EST

SUBMISSION LINK:

items.text:
Apologies for the long post..
My daughter has done a few background things in movies/shows. 

About a month ago, she had a part she was super excited about and practiced a lot for. Although it wasn't a speaking part, it was semi featured. She did one day where they did still shots but the night before her set day, they emailed and asked if she could work on Monday too. I said unfortunately no (because she had state testing at school). They responded by taking away her other set day and saying she was no longer needed. Subsequently, I told them she was really disappointed and it was unprofessional to cancel on her last minute after going all week without washing her hair (as they asked) to fit the part of what they needed. 

I realized they're connected to several other casting pages as they all post for each other and I think maybe that's why she's not getting booked this past month. 

Was I wrong for calling them unprofessional in turn?

Could they possibly be talking to the other agents and saying I called them unprofessional and not to book her because of me?

target.text:
Apologies for the long post..

My daughter has done a few background things in movies/shows. 

About a month ago, she had a part she was super excited about and practiced a lot for. Although it wasn't a speaking part, it was semi featured. She did one day where they did still shots but the night before her set day, they emailed and asked if she could work on Monday too. I said unfortunately no (because she had state testing at school). They responded by taking away her other set day and saying she was no longer needed. Subsequently, I told them she was really disappointed and it was unprofessional to cancel on her last minute after going all week without washing her hair (as they asked) to fit the part of what they needed. 

I realized they're connected to several other casting pages as they all post for each other and I think maybe that's why she's not getting booked this past month. 

Was I wrong for calling them unprofessional in turn?
Could they possibly be talking to the other agents and saying I called them unprofessional and not to book her because of me?

topComments.text: Don’t they require you to be available all days of shooting? Unfortunately, i feel like that’s one of the main factors for casting. But it’s a huge let down and I’m sorry. Sounds like she’s going places tho!!!🫶🏼

Yeah, unfortunately they usually need you to be available for all the filming days, even if your child may not actually work every day. I know it can be really frustrating, but it’s mainly for continuity and scheduling reasons. For example, if they’re filming the same scene over multiple days or continuing a scene from the day before, they need the same actor there the whole time and can’t swap in another child actor for part of it.  

I hope that makes sense. My daughter is currently filming a show in Vancouver, and we live in California, so we had to stay in Canada for almost a month. She definitely isn’t filming every single day, but production still needs her nearby and available in case schedules shift or scenes get adjusted. It’s just part of how filming works sometimes. 🤍  

Thankfully, her school has been incredibly supportive through all of this. Her teacher and the studio teachers have been collaborating closely to make sure she stays on track and completes all of her schoolwork before summer break. It definitely takes a village, but we’re very grateful everyone is working together for her. 
You got this. And feel free to reach out if you have any questions.  ￼

North of Houston, TX --Trying one more time to cast volunteers to finish my student film, The Vagrant.

This is listed as The Vagrant, Part 2 in Backstage.

Some extra scenes with a few speaking parts will be shot shortly in Conroe or Montgomery. I have some scenes for white men and women, mixed race extras 

Will have listing up soon for young black children.

Thanks

items.text:
🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ
Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:

• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡

• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡

• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

•🎬Rywalizujesz tylko z osobami w studio, nie ma quizów, testów wiedzy, szanse większe niż w Lotto ! 

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:

• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL

Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ

W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'IDŻ MA CAŁOŚĆ Εί ι พี IDŹNÁCAŁOŚĆ WYŚLIJ MAILA I CZEKAJ NA WIADOMOŚĆ PAL PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL COM.PL Dopisek: TELETURNIEJ BAW SIĘ I WYGRYWAJ'

items.text:
!!! PILNE !!! WARSZAWA !!! GLINIARZE !!!

Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie  (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

Adrian Kowalski (34) – porywacz, napakowany dresiarz, twarz kryminalisty

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe. Nie odpisuję na prywatne wiadomości.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
# ♟️DO NIEZALEŻNEGO PROJEKTU PERFORMANCE♟️

Poszukujemy osób które wcielą się w postacie czarnych/ białych figur i pionków do projektu performance który odbędzie się 3 Lipca w samym sercu Warszawy. 

Scenariusz zakłada przeprowadzenie rozgrywki szachowej przy pomocy prawdziwych osób. Gra jest z góry wyreżyserowana i odgrywa się wobec skryptu na podstawie IMMORTAL GAME z 1851 roku. 

Poszukujemy osób na stanowisko:

- CZARNA WIEŻA x2 (wysocy postawni mężczyźni "ochroniarze")
- CZARNY GONIEC x2 (wysokie kobiety o ostrym typie urody)
- BIAŁA KRÓLOWA (DRAG QUEEN/ osoby trans mile widziane :))
- PIONEK BIAŁY x2 (mężczyźni z aparycją "dresa")

-LEWY BIAŁY KOŃ (wizerunek "BAD BOY" mile widziane tatuaże i alternatywny wygląd)

- CZARNY KRÓL (wysoki mężczyzna w średnim wieku, preferowany siwy zarost i włosy)

Uczestnictwo w projekcie na zasadzie TFP

Robimy próby 13 i 27 Czerwca w Warszawie. Zgłaszajcie się do mnie poprzez wiadomość prywatną na facebooku. 

Nie jest wymagane doświadczenie aktorskie, najważniejszy jest wolny czas, sumienność i chęci :)

items.text:
SERIAL „MŁODE GLINY” 🎬 
Poszukujemy dwóch mężczyzn:
📅 CZWARTEK, 28.05
Kumpel (ok. 27 lat) - jako kolorowy artysta, jedna scena, na godzinę 13:10 zbiórka SADYBA
💰 Stawka: 100 zł
OSIŁEK - mężczyzna dobrze zbudowany w wieku 30-40 lat, jedna scena na godzinę 16:15 zbiórka PRAGA POŁUDNIE
💰 Stawka: 150 zł
📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:
casting@constantin-entertainment.pl
W zgłoszeniu prosimy podać:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• miasto zamieszkania
• numer telefonu
• informację, czy brałeś/aś już udział w serialu „Młode gliny”
❗ Koniecznie dodaj informację, jeśli występowałeś/aś już w „Młodych glinach” – napisz, kogo grałeś/aś na planie.

This is profit shared
We are now holding evening auditions for brexitus nexitus on Sunday 31st of May at the Arts Bar hope street from 6-9pm 

To register your interest and attendance email jamesmgactsing@gmail.com with your headshot so we know who to look out for.

What to prepare: prepare a small monologue lasting 1 minute maximum as we will then be workshopping the scenes.

For those who attended today you are more than welcome to attend again otherwise we will be in contact after the 31st with the outcome.

items.text: Tomorrow - FREE CLASS! (DM to book)

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
Casting Call
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe 12-14th August and later Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start ASAP in Stratford and will take place predominantly on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.

items.text:
*INCREDIBLY URGENT*

"Brody had his suspicions. His brother and his wife together? could it be... Or at least that is what he thought until his brother was found dead. Stabbed they said. The killer no where is sight. So why is it his wife seems so nervous..."

Come star in our 3 part Micro Drama student film. Looking for 3 actors, two men aged between 25 and 35, and a woman of the same age.

28th May (4pm-9pm) - Smallfield, Horley (Location).

Travel and food will be paid for.

If you are interested, please email us with a headshot of yourself and any past experience that may be relevant!

elliottfoster17@outlook.com (Elliott), carterelijah@gmail.com  (Elijah), or 22308662@bnu.ac.uk (Finn).

𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗮𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻: Belly Massage for Women & FLINTA*
​
The belly is one of the most emotionally and physically charged areas of the body — connected to stress, digestion, menstruation, hormones, emotions, vulnerability, and nervous system regulation.
​
Yet it’s also an area many people disconnect from, tense, hide, or ignore.
​
This treatment focuses exactly there: through integrative bodywork, belly massage, and nervous system-focused touch.
​
A powerful journey back to your center.
​
📍 In Berlin-Kreuzberg
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.
​
#bellymassage #abdominalmassage #womensbodywork #flintabodywork #massageberlin #bodyworkberlin #berlinkreuzberg #nervoussystemregulation

items.text:
LOGLINE

A wannabe mobster uses an app to relive — and fix — a past betrayal. But after multiple glitches, he finds himself stuck on app support hold and turns to the dark web for a solution to his clone chaos.

APPS is currently in post-production, and we’re looking for a Sound Mixer to help support the film’s final audio and sound mix. 🎧

Toronto-based preferred. This role will be remote.

This is a self-funded debut project with limited resources. A small honorarium will be provided, and you will receive credit for your work.

If interested, please send a short introduction along with your reel, portfolio, or samples of your work to:
STUDIO2425FILMS@GMAIL.COM

Thank you so much!

**CASTING CALL — CHARLIE KIRK LOOK ALIKE NEEDED**

Seeking a 31 years old white male actor/model to fill the role of Charlie Kirk for upcoming campus event at UCLA.

NON UNION.

**Talent Specs:**
* Male
* White
* Approx. 31 year old look
* Height: 6'1" and above
* Small, clean-cut face
* Able to reference statistics quickly
* Prior acting/modeling experience preferred but not required

**Project Details:**
* Paid opportunity ($1k for full day plus rehearsal day)
* Professional production environment on college campus
* Location: UCLA main campus

Please submit in comments:
* Recent headshots/photos
* Resume or relevant experience (if available)
* Availability in late August

Submissions posted below will be followed up with via private message.

Looking for reliable, professional talent with strong in-person presence. 

NON UNION.

items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/UcvK93KTtzY?si=_KVtQ_4leSnZgkw3

items.text:
🎬 Für unseren Bachelor-Abschlussfilm suchen wir dringend noch einen Schauspieler für eine Vaterrolle, als auch zwei Kleindartseller.

Gedreht wird ein Mystery-Thriller als One-Take (mit Hidden Cuts), inspiriert von „Adolescence“ und „Knives Out“.

👤 Vater von Lennard

•⁠  ⁠männlich, Spielalter 50–60, deutsch

Lennards Vater ist der Stadtpolizist der Kleinstadt: streng, stur, kontrolliert und wenig emotional. Er glaubt an Ordnung und klare Regeln, handelt aber aus dem Wunsch heraus, seine Familie zu beschützen.

👤 Stadtpolizist (Kleindarsteller)

 männlich, Spielalter 35–60, ab 180 cm

📅 Dreh: 28.05. (Nachtdreh, auf den 29.05.)

📍 Erdweg bei Dachau

🍽️ Verpflegung & ggf. Unterkunft vorhanden

💰 Studentenfilm, leider ohne Gage

topComments.text: Heyhey, bin interessiert :)
Bin 34, vielleicht würde es ja passen

items.text:
Actors —

We are currently developing and adapting De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832), South Africa’s first play.

For almost 200 years, these characters and scenes have never truly been brought to life for a modern audience.

Starting this June, we will begin filming vertical storytelling scenes and performances based on the material.

This is an opportunity to:
• become one of the first actors to perform these characters,
• help shape the future adaptation of South Africa’s first play,
• and leave your own interpretation and creative mark on material that has been dormant for generations.

If you want to be part of bringing this forgotten piece of South African theatre history back to life, apply below:

https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

sharedPost.text: Join Boniface Development Lab & Perform Characters & Scenes From De Nieuwe Ridderorde - SA’s 1st Play, Published 1832 #vlytartacting

असेल तर तो पात्र आहे.

त्यासाठी कोणतीही शैक्षणिक

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'एखादा व्यकी महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री शकतो. होऊ दिग्दर्शक पण शिक्षणाविना होऊ शकत नाही. DIRECTOR 프렌시인라 PRCUCTION AKE FITLL DARECOOR EPA DATE VOTE मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी आवश्यक जर त्वाच्याकडे मतदान कार्ड असेल तर तो पात्र आहे. दिग्दर्शक होण्यासाठी आवश्यक संवंधित विषयांचे शिक्षण आवश्यक आहे. डिप्लोमा पदवी किंवा प्रमाणपत्र आवश्यक. चित्रपट निमितीचे ज्ञान, कौशल्य आणि अनुभव आवश्यक. फक्त सख्याबळ तयार करावे लागते. त्यासाठी कोणतीही शैक्षणिक पात्रता आवश्यक नसते. सतत शिक्षण, अध्ययन आणि प्रशिक्षम आवश्यक. फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमधील बोगस दिग्दर्शकांपासून सावध रहा. हांसाठी स्वतः सरकारने पुढे येऊन कठोर पावले उचलावी! रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख फिल्म मेकर 98500-49002 पारदर्शकता प्रामाणिकता जवाबदारी'

items.title: एखादा व्यक्ती महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री होऊ शकतो. पण शिक्षणा विना

items.text:
Moe Fields - the special bond between fathers and sons" is a Father's Day story for the ages. My father didn’t work on Wall St. My dad was a Plumber – a guy who was proud to work with his hands. I wrote this book to honor him--and ALL fathers; to celebrate the lessons they taught us.

The bloody image of the 1932 golden gloves competitor still inspires me. So, too, does his Navy WWII service. But one funny story from the book stands out.

The lesson in Lodi, NJ: I remember him towering over us, as kids. He was such a large guy. I remember the size of his hands swooping down to lift me to the sky.

But what I remember the most was his work ethic. I recall at 10-years old, when he took me on a job in Lodi New Jersey. It was a Cape Cod house. I remember it so well. We climbed the stairs.. I could smell the second-floor bathroom even as we walked down the hallway.

Dad walked into the bathroom and lifted the cover of the toilet. It was filled with paper and brown waste. He slowly turned to me, “Zach, stick your hands in the toilet and see what’s stopping it from flushing.”

The words hung in the air. I looked down at the toilet bowl and then up at my father’s 6’2” frame, 250 lbs., with those long arms that reached down past his waist. Those arms were connected to the largest set of hands I had ever seen.

Dad never gave instructions to his boys more than once. If we didn’t hear him or respond, the next experience was the back of his hand. The crack was so fast and furious; it would take several minutes before the pain registered in our brain. There was no sparing the rod. The boundary lines and expectations were clear.

I wasn’t about to challenge his instructions. I could see he was serious. I took off my coat and rolled up my shirt sleeves. I reached deep into the toilet bowl, with a determination I hoped he would be proud of. After several minutes fishing around for an answer I did not have, I pulled my hands out. The brown goo clung to my fingers. Once again, I looked up to dad for direction.

He paused for a minute to reinforce his message. He looked down at me. He then spoke slowly, “Zach, now you know the meaning of work! If you’re not afraid to get your hands dirty, you’ll be ok. Now, go wash your hands.”

The lesson from Lodi, New Jersey stayed with me. It’s a lesson I have used to shape my own ideas about life, work – and being a father.

Winner 2022 National Literary Award for Memoirs

Amazon best seller

Please repost and share with your favorite dad -- or son & daughter working at being a parent -- and wondering about their legacy.

See less

items.summary:
Moe Fields - the special bond between fathers and sons" is a Father's Day story for the ages. My father didn’t work on Wall St. My dad was a Plumber – a guy who was proud to work with his hands. I wrote this book to honor him--and ALL fathers; to celebrate the lessons they taught us.

The bloody image of the 1932 golden gloves competitor still inspires me. So, too, does his Navy WWII service. But one funny story from the book stands out.

The lesson in Lodi, NJ: I remember him towering over us, as kids. He was such a large guy. I remember the size of his hands swooping down to lift me to the sky.

But what I remember the most was his work ethic. I recall at 10-years old, when he took me on a job in Lodi New Jersey. It was a Cape Cod house. I remember it so well. We climbed the stairs.. I could smell the second-floor bathroom even as we walked down the hallway.

Dad walked into the bathroom and lifted the cover of the toilet. It was filled with paper and brown waste. He slowly turned to me, “Zach, stick your hands in the toilet and see what’s stopping it from flushing.”

The words hung in the air. I looked down at the toilet bowl and then up at my father’s 6’2” frame, 250 lbs., with those long arms that reached down past his waist. Those arms were connected to the largest set of hands I had ever seen.

Dad never gave instructions to his boys more than once. If we didn’t hear him or respond, the next experience was the back of his hand. The crack was so fast and furious; it would take several minutes before the pain registered in our brain. There was no sparing the rod. The boundary lines and expectations were clear.

I wasn’t about to challenge his instructions. I could see he was serious. I took off my coat and rolled up my shirt sleeves. I reached deep into the toilet bowl, with a determination I hoped he would be proud of. After several minutes fishing around for an answer I did not have, I pulled my hands out. The brown goo clung to my fingers. Once again, I looked up to dad for direction.

He paused for a minute to reinforce his message. He looked down at me. He then spoke slowly, “Zach, now you know the meaning of work! If you’re not afraid to get your hands dirty, you’ll be ok. Now, go wash your hands.”

The lesson from Lodi, New Jersey stayed with me. It’s a lesson I have used to shape my own ideas about life, work – and being a father.

Winner 2022 National Literary Award for Memoirs

Amazon best seller

Please repost and share with your favorite dad -- or son & daughter working at being a parent -- and wondering about their legacy.

See less

🎬 CASTING – SZYBKA AKCJA! 🎬
✨ Poszukiwana kobieta do roli EKSPERTKI – rola mówiona

👩‍🦱 Kogo szukamy?

• Brunetka

• Wiek: 38–50 lat

• Typ modelki

• Włosy średnie lub długie

• Ładna dykcja

• Pewna siebie, intrygująca i dostojna, ale jednocześnie ciepła i niedystansująca

📅 Zdjęcia: 03.06

💰 Stawka: wysoka

🎭 Zainteresowanym Paniom wyślę:

• kartę castingową

• scenkę do odegrania

⏰ Nagranie scenki należy przesłać do jutra do godziny 16:00

📩 Zgłoszenia: plan@filmakcja.pl

Tytuł maila:

✉️ Ekspertka 03.06

W treści zgłoszenia:

✔ imię i nazwisko

✔ wiek

✔ numer telefonu

✔ wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki

✔ wizytówka

🎞️ Czekam na Wasze zgłoszenia!

Filmakcja Marta 😁🎬

items.text: bongoproductions.com

sharedPost.text:
Come train with experienced actor and coach, Michael Caruana!

Expert guidance and coaching, trusted, since 1996, at bongo productions. 

DATES FOR JUNE THURSDAY NIGHT SCENE-STUDY CLASS:

JUNE 4th, 10th, 18th and 25th - 6-9 pm.

Book a FREE consultation with Michael at bongoproductions.com or contact us at (416) 294-3754.

In this Scene-study class, at my bongo productions studio, we're preparing and taping scenes, telling compelling stories, reviewing foundational process preparation techniques and analysis, with a focus on screen acting skills and technique, using 2 cameras.

Revitalize your screen acting experience!

bongo productions is a proud member of AACE! (Association of Acting Coaches and Educators)

"There are actors who pursue their objective by playing one action and that's it. Their work doesn't surprise me because it's too control-oriented. I'd rather give something of myself away. Once the scene's dynamic is starting to occur, l'll go with it and then try to shift it, too, just like you would in life. The shifting is important. Then, if I can get to the point when that's happening and I don't know what I'm doing, that's inspiration. I've done all my work and then I try to achieve this other, living dimension, the human dimension. It ceases being my work and it becomes living. If I have a chance to make interesting choices, then as long as I'm not grandstanding, I'm willing to go that route. Who knows? I've seen people go beyond anything I would have expected of them. Life can accomplish anything, any size, any dimension - it's all human."

 -John Turturro, The Actor Speaks

items.text:
# **RATTLE** | Paid Casting Call

**PRODUCTION COMPANY: **National Film and Television School

**LOCATION**: West Ealing

**SHOOT DATES**: 30 June - 5 July 2025 (1-2 shoot days within this window)

**FEE**: £142.44/day (NFTS/Equity Short Film Agreement)

**PROJECT SUMMARY**

Rattle is a 20-minute short film following Charli, a 21-year-old homeless pregnant woman, across one desperate night in London, as she's battered by the brutal cycles of addiction, exploitation and survival. The film is unflinching and raw, but never exploitative. It aims to portray the realities of addiction, homelessness, sex work and survival through the lens of one woman’s resilience. Directed by Antigone Rae (NFTS).
> ***Content Advisory: ***this film contains depictions of drug use, sex work and a non-consensual encounter. An intimacy coordinator will be present. Full duty of care will be in place throughout.
**ROLES**

**DREW (30s-60s)**

Drew is a softly spoken club owner with an instinct for recruiting vulnerable people. Presenting himself as caring and protective, he has a knack for making people feel seen in order to earn their trust. Seeing Charli panhandling, he approaches her with the promise of shelter and a regular income. Although she’s initially suspicious and refuses his help, later her situation becomes desperate enough for her to accept. Beneath Drew’s gentle demeanour is someone deeply manipulative and controlling, and it soon becomes clear that his motives aren’t altruistic.

**KAI (20s-30s)**

Kai is Charli’s boyfriend at the beginning of the film. He was meant to back her up on a job, but didn’t show. When she confronts him, he shrugs it off, which pushes Charli to leave him. He isn’t overtly cruel or aggressive. He’s worse, in some ways: lazy, self-serving, emotionally absent, and completely unbothered by the danger Charli is in.

**BODGE (20s-30s)**

Bodge is Charli’s dealer. Slight, street-smart and dryly funny, he’s exhausted by her: she owes him money, always has an excuse, and somehow always ends up getting what she needs. He’s frustrated and at the end of his patience, but isn’t necessarily unkind. There’s humour in him, and a familiarity with Charli. We’re looking for someone who can bring dryness and an edge, but also humanity to Bodge.

**HASAN (40s-60s)**

Hasan works at the chicken shop and is one of the few people who sees Charli as a person, not a problem or a project. He is warm, decent and protective - offering her a hot drink, letting her use the bathroom, speaking to her like a person - but even Hasan’s kindness has limits when his manager forces her out the door. Arabic-speaking is preferred, but not essential.

**DINA 'MANAGER' (50s-60s)**

The Manager runs the kitchen at the chicken shop. She refuses to let Charli use the bathroom, having previously seen her shoot up in there. She is no-nonsense, pragmatic and unsentimental. She isn’t a monster - but she is running a business, and clashes with Hasan over it. Arabic-speaking is preferred, but not essential.

**AKSHAR (30s-40s)**

Akshar lives in a flat nearby, and buys stolen goods from Charli. He knows he probably shouldn’t, and there’s an awkwardness to him, but he still goes through with it. He’s not malicious - just morally weak, slightly uncomfortable, and willing to look away as and when it suits him.

**PUNTER (30s-40s)**

The Punter appears at the opening of the film, paying Charli for sex acts in his car. He is not overtly threatening. If anything, he’s a bit of a pathetic, tragic character: lonely, grubby, emotionally stunted, the kind of man whose car is full of fast-food wrappers and who's probably still living with Mum. Note: this scene involves simulated intimacy.

**SANDRA 'THE GOOD SAMARITAN'(40s-80s)**

She sits next to Charli on the steps and gives her food from a carrier bag, despite Charli’s lack of enthusiasm. She’s well-meaning, altruistic, but also slightly clueless and out of touch about what it means for someone to be in Charli’s position.

**FLAT RESIDENT (30s-50s):**
He finds Charli in his stairwell, shooting up. Sick of addicts accosting his hallways, he knocks the needle from her hand and violently removes her from the building.

**HOW TO ****APPLY **

To apply, please email *rattlefilm@gmail.com* with your showreel, Spotlight link if you have one, a recent headshot, where you are based, and which character you are applying for.

*Suitable applicants will be invited to either self-tape or attend a Zoom audition.*

items.text:
Headshots that help casting imagine you in the role.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

Most of my sessions are shot indoors in a more controlled and comfortable environment, whatever the weather decides to do outside.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.previewTitle:
📣📣CASTING CALL for our DYLAN (playing 16) 🎬🎭

Mild, likeable, quietly funny and watchful. The friend who helps you up, laughs it off and makes adults assume everything is fine. Until the pressure hits.

Actors 18+ (must be able to play 16). Ideally SE, Sussex, Brighton-based.

Dylan is practical and easy to trust, the kind of boy who keeps the peace without needing credit. Underneath, he is fiercely protective and loyal to the point of dangerous. When he is scared, he lies cleanly. When he is cornered, he goes quiet and decisive. His darkness is not loud. It is controlled, and capable of crossing a line he cannot uncross.

Inspo (in order): Devin Druid as Tyler Down in 13 Reasons Why, Nicholas Brendon as Xander in Buffy, @raphael_luce  as Henry Creel in Stranger Things, Jess in Gilmore Girls plus that ordinary-then-unsettling flip of Owen Cooper as Jamie Miller in Adolescence. Welcome to Brighton 🎈Stephen King vibes, 1990s, Britpop, vertical drama.

Submit by email: TAWHT@vivlovesfilm.com with subject line DYLAN. Include bio, actual age, playing age, headshot, showreel (if you have), Spotlight link (if relevant) and a short note on why Dylan speaks to you.

Will you join our pack? 🐺🫶🏼🐺

#casting #castingcall #malelead #brighton

items.previewTitle:
📣📣 CASTING CALL for our ROBIN (playing 16)🎬🎭

Sensitive, likeable, quietly magnetic and always clocking the room. The boy who makes you feel seen. The one who can laugh along, keep pace, and make it look like nothing gets to him. Until it does.

Actors 18+ (must be able to play 16). Ideally SE, Sussex, Brighton-based.

Robin is smart and emotionally tuned-in, the kind of kid adults underestimate because he seems polite and “fine”. He is the friend who listens, the friend who notices, the friend who remembers. Underneath, he is desperate to belong, and that need makes him adaptable in ways that scare him later. When he senses danger, he does not always speak. When the group shifts, he shifts with it. His flaw is not cruelty. It is silence. And once he has stayed quiet, he cannot un-know what he allowed.

Inspo (in order): 

Dylan Minnette as Clay Jensen in 13 Reasons Why
Graham Verchere as Miles Miller in Summer of 84
Lonnie Chavis as young Randall Pearson in This Is Us
Wil Wheaton as Gordie Lachance in Stand By Me
Ethan Hawke in Dead Poets Society 

Welcome to Brighton 🎈Stephen King vibes, 1990s, Britpop, vertical drama.

Submit by email: TAWHT@vivlovesfilm.com with subject line ROBIN. Include bio, actual age, playing age, headshot, showreel (if you have), Spotlight link (if relevant) and a short note on why Robin speaks to you.

Will you join our pack? 🐺🫶🏼🐺

#casting #castingcall #malelead #brighton

items.text: Join us THURSDAY! First class FREE! 😊

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

🔥Gramy nowy serial kryminalny🔥

💥GANGSTER (20-45 l.) 
Data: 28.05 / czwartek - 1 scena akcji do zagrania 😊
Stawka: 200 zł 
Gramy: KATOWICE – Centrum obok Spodka 
Start: 11:00  Koniec: 13:00
 
💲Stawka netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie 💲
(Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło)

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com
W tytule prosimy wpisać „GANGSTER” 

📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy :)

items.text:
FORUM THEATRE

A free interactive community performance where the audience is no longer just watching.

Forum Theatre invites people to step into the scene, react, question decisions, and explore different outcomes together.

Through live performance and audience participation, we explore communication, identity, conflict, power, human connection, and the choices we make around each other every day.

This is not traditional theatre.

It is alive, unpredictable, emotional, and shaped by the people in the room.

You are welcome to simply watch or actively participate.

Everyone is invited.

Sunday, June 7th
19:00

Wolskie Centrum Kultury
Ulica Wolska 46/48
Warsaw

Free Entry

Performed by an international ensemble:

Tetiana Popadyn
Iraiyanban Gunasekaran
Isaias Emílio Paulino do Carmo
Diana Santos
Marilitsa Konstantopoulou
Jeremy Dona
Meltem Gulnur Kefeli

Supported by Impact Warsaw and Wolskie Centrum Kultury

@impactwarsaw
impactwarsaw.com

Ochota na orzeźwienie? Brzmi jak plan! Trwa casting do reklamy znanego napoju! 

! NOWY CASTING ! ROLE MÓWIONE ! WYSOKIE STAWKI !

Do dynamicznej, energetycznej reklamy popularnego napoju poszukujemy naturalnych, charyzmatycznych osób z prawdziwą energią!

Poszukujemy:

Główny bohater- Mężczyzna 20-40 lat, rola mówiona. Dobrze zbudowany. Mile widziane długie włosy, ale nie są konieczne.

PRZYJACIELE — DZIEWCZYNY Kobiety 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

PRZYJACIELE — CHŁOPCY Mężczyźni 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

STAWKI:

Od 5 do nawet 12 000 !!!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

Zgłoszenia: do 27.05 do godz. 18:00 

Recall: 31.05 (niedziela)

Przymiarki: 3.06 i 5.06

Zdjęcia: 8.06/Warszawa

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Link do castingu + opis scenek do nagrania:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting060/

Tytuł: 060

Gotowy/a na energetyczny zastrzyk adrenaliny? Czekamy na Ciebie!

CASTING CALL - SHORT FILM (DALLAS, TX)
Ever met a salesman who could sell you anything in under a minute?
Title: Salesman
Non-Union | Unpaid (Copy & Credit)
Casting for a short indie film shooting in Austin:
Salesman (Male, 30-40)
A confident, quick-talking door-to-door salesman who engages customers and sets up "free quote" appointments. Looking for strong presence, natural charisma, and sharp dialogue delivery.
Note: This is a brief role (~2 minutes of screen time).
Shoot Details:
• Location: Dallas, Tx
• Dates: Flexible in May (based on availability)
To Submit:
Send headshot and reel/portfolio (if available) to
san2cinecreations@gmail.com

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**
*Produced by Jovial Giants Productions*

Jovial Giants Productions is seeking passionate, dedicated actors to bring *HALLOWED* to life — a chilling, faith-based thriller feature film that blends psychological tension with spiritual horror.

**📖 About the Film**
When a newly appointed priest arrives at a quiet rural church, he quickly discovers something is deeply wrong. The previous priest didn’t leave… he was sealed inside the old chapel. As whispers turn to revelations, the congregation’s expectations become terrifyingly clear — they believe he is next.

This is a story about faith under pressure, the weight of tradition, and the darkness that can hide behind devotion.

**🎥 Production Details**
* **Location:** Northeast Indiana area
* **Schedule:** June 20th-August 2nd (Weekends ONLY) 
* **Union Status:** Non-union
* **Compensation:** No pay; however, cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a passionate team

**🎭 Audition Instructions**
Please submit a **self-taped audition** using the provided [SIDES HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yfSzW3nqvyFyk00hxQ9Yz-1uJZiOUQCROhDxHKqTo5o/edit?usp=sharing). You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you. 

Email: **jovialgiants@gmail.com**
Subject Line: **ACTOR: HALLOWED**

**🎬 Character Breakdown**
* **Elias** – (20s-30s M LEAD) The new priest. Intelligent, compassionate, and searching for purpose. His journey is the emotional core of the film as he confronts fear, doubt, and truth.
* **Caleb** – (12yo M) Steady and devoted. Trusting others to a fault.
* **Mrs. Kline** – (50s-80s F) Composed, with a quiet authority. Speaks with conviction and carries the weight of the church’s past.
* **Deacon Marsh** – (40-60s M) Welcoming on the surface, but firm in his beliefs. Represents the polished, persuasive face of the congregation.
* **Deacon Sharp** – (50s-60s M) More rigid and intense than Marsh. His faith borders on fanaticism, and he doesn’t tolerate dissent.
* **The Presence** – (Male Voiceover) A mysterious force. Ominous, ambiguous, and deeply unnerving.
* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**

* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**
items.title: **🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**

items.text:
Looking for a filming location around Los Angeles for upcoming NYFA MFA Producing short film projects.

Does anyone have access to either:

• A therapist office that could be used for a one-day shoot

OR preferably

• A house with a home office that could double as a therapist office, along with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and some type of patio/backyard area.

Ideally looking for a location available for 3 filming days in a row so I can shoot multiple projects the same week:
• Bad at Love
• Love Bots
• Love

(Yes, there is definitely a theme there.)

I should have pitch packet materials available soon, but finding the location first is important so I know which project to focus on for my class production. Only one film is for class, but I am trying to complete multiple projects around the same timeframe. If everything can be filmed together, my school will be able to cover the location insurance.

Please message me if you know of a possible location or someone who might be interested. Thank you!

- LuvLeighAn Clark

items.text: hi all, is it common for agencies to give you false hope? 😂 happened twice in a month, both reputable agencies. i had a meeting with one about 3 weeks ago, they said that they *will* give me more info about on boarding etc. the next day. heard nothing, chased and heard nothing. another one last week said that i was gonna get a call that day then it changed to the next day (friday) and heard nothing. chased them both but no responses. is this common or is it just … idk but it’s feeling like time wasters at this point 😭 i expected more tbf, the lack of communication is atrocious.

topComments.text: It is like that I had 3 roles pending and nothing

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We are looking for extras for a nightclub scene in Beverly Hills for our independent series **COLD CITY**.

We need men and women, ages 21–45, all ethnicities are welcome.

**Date:** Thursday, May 28
**Call time:** 10:00 AM
**Location:** Beverly Hills
**Outfit:** Nightclub / going-out look, something you would wear to a nice club in Beverly Hills.

This is a small independent production, so we can offer a **$20 gas fee**, food on set, and a chance to be part of our series, meet great people, and have a fun filming experience.

If you’re interested and available, please send me a private message for all the details.

Thank you so much, and have a great day!

items.title: Hi everyone!

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

We are looking for people of Japanese descent to feature in an upcoming commercial! 🎥✨
If you are based in or near Warsaw and available for a shoot at the end of May, we want to hear from you. 
This is a fantastic opportunity with highly competitive pay! 💸

📅 When: Late May
📍 Where: Warsaw
🎬 Role: Japanese descent

📩 How to apply:
Send your application to casting@twarze.pl with the subject line "Japonia".

Please make sure to include:
• Your recent photos 📸
• Your phone number 📞
• 
Don’t miss out—send your submission today! Tag or share with anyone who might be a great fit! 👇  www.twarze.pl

items.text: Sooooooo... First off, Hello! I'm Ian and came to Boulder for grad school. I've done music videos and short films with stopmotion and live-action. I have a screenplay that I wrote back home and am posting to gauge interest. It's bloody and contains nudity and humor and I have the hitchhiker from TCM's voice acting for a stopmotion satan. The rest is live action. With the network I've built so far I will be be able to get a pretty good sound track for free.  BUT... I can not pay! I'd be aiming for shooting principle photography next summer.

items.text:
Apologies for the long post..
My daughter has done a few background things in movies/shows. 

About a month ago, she had a part she was super excited about and practiced a lot for. Although it wasn't a speaking part, it was semi featured. She did one day where they did still shots but the night before her set day, they emailed and asked if she could work on Monday too. I said unfortunately no (because she had state testing at school). They responded by taking away her other set day and saying she was no longer needed. Subsequently, I told them she was really disappointed and it was unprofessional to cancel on her last minute after going all week without washing her hair (as they asked) to fit the part of what they needed. 

I realized they're connected to several other casting pages as they all post for each other and I think maybe that's why she's not getting booked this past month. 

Was I wrong for calling them unprofessional in turn?

Could they possibly be talking to the other agents and saying I called them unprofessional and not to book her because of me?

target.text:
Apologies for the long post..

My daughter has done a few background things in movies/shows. 

About a month ago, she had a part she was super excited about and practiced a lot for. Although it wasn't a speaking part, it was semi featured. She did one day where they did still shots but the night before her set day, they emailed and asked if she could work on Monday too. I said unfortunately no (because she had state testing at school). They responded by taking away her other set day and saying she was no longer needed. Subsequently, I told them she was really disappointed and it was unprofessional to cancel on her last minute after going all week without washing her hair (as they asked) to fit the part of what they needed. 

I realized they're connected to several other casting pages as they all post for each other and I think maybe that's why she's not getting booked this past month. 

Was I wrong for calling them unprofessional in turn?
Could they possibly be talking to the other agents and saying I called them unprofessional and not to book her because of me?

topComments.text:
I’m sorry that happened, but reacting by calling them unprofessional is honestly the fastest way to make sure they don’t call her in again.

I run a very busy casting office, and if someone said that to me, I’d absolutely make a note on the talent’s profile so I remembered the interaction the next time they were submitted. Will casting offices blast that information around town? No. But bridges absolutely get burned over things like this.

The reality is, we need talent who are flexible, understanding, and able to roll with changes without taking it personally. As Jen said, this kind of thing happens constantly in casting. Schedules shift, callbacks move, clients change their minds, timing gets chaotic. It’s just part of the business.

When someone reacts emotionally or makes it clear they can’t handle the unpredictability, casting will usually just stop bringing them in because it feels risky and difficult. Fair or not, that’s the truth.

I completely understand being disappointed or frustrated. But in this industry, professionalism is often less about things going perfectly and more about how you handle it when they don’t.

This sounds like they had to find a girl similar that looks like your daughter to use as a photo double and a replacement because your daughter wasn’t available. They didn’t take the part away. Maybe they just simply replaced her for the remaining shots. I don’t know, but that’s what it sounds like to me.

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

***We are still seeking the roles below for our Storyhive short. Please submit ASAP!* **

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

items.text:
Casting call for non-speaking product video
Still trying to find the last talent for this shoot! I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: Ethnically ambiguous (tan/brown skin tone) male, age late 30's or 40's.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera.

Location: White Rock

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

Subject line: “shaving casting”

If you have already applied to my earlier casting call, there is no need to re-apply.

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat **uzdolnionego wokalnie (najchętniej śpiew ludowy, choć niekoniecznie).

Zdjęcia planowane na rok 2027, w tej chwili rozpoczynamy castingi.

** **

 

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube, krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą oraz nagranie śpiewu chłopca (również jako link do You Tube).

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **WBG**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka. Bez osób towarzyszących na zdjęciu.

items.text:
🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

items.title: Zarejestruj się i otrzymuj zlecenia na plany filmowe w Twoim mieście🙂

sharedPost.text:
Sesja zdjęciowej dla klienta z branży eventowo - biznesowej! Poszukujemy dzieci:

🔹 Dziewczynki, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/7dade83ff01142b4ae0a848c8c136b88

🔹 Chłopcy, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/46ba1a3b82f24c3db879179f2203a199

📍 Termin zdjęć: 5 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:
Otwarte, śmiałe. Proszę o zdjęcia z uśmiechem, w ruchu, podczas zabawy. Link z wizytówką będzie dodatkowym atutem.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez linki zamieszczone pod nazwą roli. W razie dodatkowych pytań kontakt na: sky.zgloszenie@gmail.com

❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane.

items.text:
Ciao,

We’re currently expanding our roster and inviting experienced performers.

If you’re interested in overseas contracts and regular performance work, you’re welcome to apply here:

Apply: https://4cddv63e.forms.app/muse-collective-artist-roster

For future openings and updates, follow:

Instagram: www.instagram.com/muse_collective_entertainment?igsh=YWZmazlqMjJreTln&utm_source=qr
We’re always excited to connect with great talent worldwide.

Best Regards, 
Michaela

items.text: hello, my name is Maya🪽. Im young dancer from Poland, im 19 years old. I love dancing since i was a kid, my dream is to be a dancer in the future, i really want to work on a stage, i love being on stage i feel like thats where i belong. Im sending two of my dance videos, i’m open to any sorts of criticism, offers and advice.

topComments.text: Dear Maya, first of all, good luck on your journey. Second, if you want to be seen, first take it literally. As in every artistic thing in the industry, you have to clearly communicate your style, personality and skills. Maybe the first step should be to make videos, and put it out there, yes. But if you look at other artists, you can get an idea, how to advertise yourself. It is a business after all. So for example, if you apply somewhere, your videos should be bright, clean, preferably in a rehearsal room, or somewhere, that has...depth. Nowadays, you don't need a crew and expensive camera, your phone is enough. But they need to see 'you'. Show your eyes, your passion, and maybe some of your trick here and there. And you good to go. Keep at it, and watch tons of references. Good luck to you.

https://youtu.be/sf3L_VO1vHg?si=O5luUmYNND7ecGrn 

I would recommend making a resume’ that includes training and workshops you have done. As well as make a demo reel I have attached mine for reference

items.summary: hello, my name is Maya🪽. Im young dancer from Poland, im 19 years old. I love dancing since i was a kid, my dream is to be a dancer in the future, i really want to work on a stage, i love being on stage i feel like thats where i belong. Im sending two of my dance videos, i’m open to any sorts of criticism, offers and advice.

items.previewTitle: ⚡ Masz energię, którą pokocha kamera? My mamy casting dla branży energetycznej! ⚡ – UNAGI MEDIA
items.previewDescription: Do energetycznej reklamy poszukujemy naturalnych, charyzmatycznych osób z prawdziwą energią!Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, całe rodziny oraz osoby, które po prostu mają w sobie autentyczność i swobodę.

sharedPost.text:
⚡️Masz energię, którą pokocha kamera? My mamy casting dla branży energetycznej! ⚡️

! NOWY CASTING ! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ! ENERGETYCZNY PLAN !

STAWKI:
Od 4 do 9 000 zł !!!

Poszukujemy:
Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, całe rodziny oraz osoby, które po prostu mają w sobie autentyczność i swobodę.

ROLE GŁÓWNE:

Para – 30-35 lat

Szukamy zgranego duetu z fajną energią i naturalnością. Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, ale pojedyncze osoby też są ok.

EPIZODY:

Kasjer na stacji paliw– (wiek nieokreślony)- konkretny, spokojny i kompetentny pracownik stacji paliw.

Rodzice 30-35 lat + dziecko (8 miesięcy- 1,5 roku)

Chętnie cała rodzina. Dziecko powinno chodzić lub stawiać pierwsze kroki. Zależy nam na ciepłej, naturalnej relacji i spontaniczności.

Para około 25 lat

Szukamy naturalnej pary z lekkim, niewymuszonym humorem. Pojedyncze osoby również mile widziane.

Przyjaciele na koncercie/studenci – 19-29 lat

Mężczyzna ok. 40-50  lat

Tutaj pan musi lubić psy, dobrze się z nimi komunikować i nie może mieć uczulenia. Miło jeśli ktoś ma swojego psa – poszukujemy kundelka.

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

28.05 -Termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 19.00

03.06 – Recall

11.06 – Przymiarki

15.06 lub 16.06 – Zdjęcia w Warszawie

Link do castingu i opis scenki do nagrania:
unagimedia.pl/casting058/

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 058

Nie zwalniaj- wejdź do gry i zgłoś się już dziś!

items.text:
SZUKAM AKTORÓW DO FILMU NON-PROFIT RZESZÓW
Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia – tutaj będziesz mógł/mogła uzupełnić swoje portfolio.

Szczerze mówiąc, nie jestem wielkim producentem filmowym ani reżyserem, ale bardzo zależy mi na nagraniu filmu, ponieważ jest to jedno z moich największych marzeń. Pomyślałem, że może dzięki temu ktoś z Was również spełni swoje marzenie o zostaniu aktorem, dlatego postanowiłem rozpocząć swój projekt pod tytułem „Ostatnia Szansa”.

Krótki opis fabuły:

Andreas trafia do świata zmarłych, gdzie musi zmierzyć się ze swoimi największymi lękami u boku ludzi, którzy skrywają wiele sekretów.

Nie szukam modeli, bardziej kogoś autentycznego,  nie martw się jeśli masz jaką kolwiek wadę w swoim wyglądzie.  

POTRZEBUJĘ:

DZIEWCZYNY (3 RÓL)

Evily – 22 lata 

Krótka rola.

Charakter: odważna, chaotyczna.

Wygląd: szczupła, wysoka blondynka.

Mama Andreasa – około 35 lat

Krótka rola.

Wygląd: dowolny.

Liwia – 20 lat

Krótka rola.

Wygląd: rude włosy, zielone oczy, piegi.

---

CHŁOPACY (16 RÓL)

Andreas – 17 lat Aleksander mess

Główny bohater.

Charakter: miły, strachliwy, spokojny, rozsądny.

Wygląd: długie fioletowe włosy, szare oczy.

Sui – 22 lata

Jedna z głównych postaci.

Charakter: waleczny, troskliwy, spokojny.

Wygląd: azjatycka uroda, czarne oczy, bardzo długie czarne włosy sięgające za biodra.

Lucyfer– 22 lata

Chłopak o  ciemno rudych włosach, młodym wyglądzie i niebeiskich włosach. Kilka krótkich ról.

Terror – 24 lata

Jedna z głównych postaci.

Charakter: zabawny, chaotyczny, energiczny, romantyczny.

Wygląd: zielone oczy, dobrze zbudowany, młody wygląd, brązowe włosy (wolf cut), tatuaże na rękach.

William – 17 lat

Postać trzecioplanowa.

Charakter: agresywny, nieuważny, problemy rozwiązuje siłą.

Wygląd: zielone oczy, czerwone włosy.

Nicolas – 30 lat 

Jedna z głównych postaci.

Charakter: rozważny, spokojny, poważny. Choruje na nerwicę natręctw.

Wygląd: brązowe oczy, okulary, czarne włosy.

Alejandro – 17 lat

Jedna z głównych postaci, krótka rola.

Charakter: nieodpowiedzialny, mistrz narzekania, kocha imprezy.

Wygląd: ciemna karnacja, dredy, brązowe włosy, kilka tatuaży.

Tata Andreasa – około 40 lat

Krótka rola.

Wygląd: dowolny.

Satan – 26 lat

Ważna rola trzecioplanowa.

Charakter: manipulacyjny, urokliwy, ambitny.

Wygląd: czarne włosy, czarne oczy.

Ksawery – 18 lat -Aleksander 

Jedna z głównych postaci, krótka rola.

Charakter: strachliwy, niepewny siebie.

Wygląd: blond włosy, szczupły, niebieskie oczy.

Policjant – około 40 lat

Krótka rola, jedna lub dwie kwestie.

Wygląd: dowolny.

Współpracownik Nicolasa – 34 lata

Kilka krótkich kwestii.

Wygląd: dowolny.

Lucas – 10 i 28 lat

Potrzebnych jest dwóch aktorów do zagrania tej samej postaci:

– jako dziecko (10 lat),

– jako dorosły (28 lat).

Wygląd: czarne włosy, zielone oczy.

Lekarze, pielęgniarki, statyści – 30–40 lat 

Potrzeba kilku osób do krótkich ról lekarzy w szpitalu.

Wygląd: dowolny.

Matt – 23 lata

Postać drugoplanowa.

Charakter: uparty, wredny, nieuczciwy.

Wygląd: czarnoskóry mężczyzna, dredy, szczupły.

Kai – 22 lata 

Ważna rola.

Charakter: miły, opiekuńczy, zaradny, odważny.

Wygląd: blada cera, białe włosy, niebieskie oczy, młody wygląd.

Potrzebowałbym także psa, który wyglądem przypomina wilka, oraz osoby, która dałaby radę się nim zająć podczas nagrań. Chodzi mi o to, aby pies dobrze odegrał swoją rolę.

film może zawierać sceny seksu bądź sceny zbliżone.  Otwartość na zmiany wyglądu, np noszenie soczewek, peruki, farbowanie włosów itp.  Możliwość występowania związków homoseksualnych, postaci trans seksualnych itp. 

 

Wszyscy aktorzy zostaną dodani na specjalną grupę dla aktorów, film będzie kręcony w  Rzeszowie, reszta informacji w wiadomości prywatnej. 

Rzeszów dzień jeszcze nie wiadomo kiedy dokładnie, możliwe że koło czerwca bądź lipca

items.text:
Hej! 

Zaczynamy casting do reklamy napoju. 

Generalne uwagi: 

Dziewczyna nie może mieć krótkich włosów  

Unikamy piercingu i tatuaży w widocznych miejscach choć klient dopuszcza zakrycie make upem jeżeli będzie fajna osoba 

Role mówione. 

**SZUKAMY: **

1. Dude character- 20-40 - mile widziane długie włosy, nie są totalnie konieczne  - rola mówiona, dobra zbudowany mężczyzna
2. Kobiety w wieku 20-25 lat - przyjaciele - epizod różnym typie urody. Mile widziane cechy charakterystyczne 
3. Mężczyźni w wieku 20-25 - przyjaciele - epizod  lat  o różnym typie urody. Mile widziane cechy charakterystyczne 

**TIMING: **

28.05 - termin wysyłania materiałów do 12.00 

31.05 - tak wiemy to niedziela recall 

03.06 - przymiarki 

05.06 przymiarki 

08.06 - zdjęcia 

*Stawki *

*Rola główna od 9500 za prawa *

*Rola epizodyczna od 5500 zł za prawa - stawki zależą od opcji na jakie zdecyduje się klient *

Na materiały czekam pod mailem [slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com)

W tytule maila proszę wpisać napój + imię i nazwisko 

W teści 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Numer telefonu 
4. 2-3 zdjęcia 
5. Informacje do jakiej roli się zgłaszasz.

items.text:
🚨 One Week Left to Tape for Leading Role in a Camden Fringe Production🚨
Hello everyone! My name is Liam David Malcolm and I'm excited to announce that a team of us are premiering a new, queer play called Broken Boys to the Hen and Chicken Theatre on August 14th - 16th 😄

Show Website Link: https://camdenfringe.com/events/broken-boys/

We're looking to cast one of two leading roles in this play, and want to hear from you 🫵

See below for more information! If you fit the brief, we'd love to hear from you, or if you know someone who might, please share along 🫶

items.text:
Hello there, everybody how are you all doing? My name is Sean McLean. I’m an actor a model and a musician.

I’ve been within this industry for almost a decade. I’ve worked all around the world with various different agencies as well as brands campaigns, feature films, Short films and commercials. I’ve walked in London Fashion week on multiple occasions.

I also make and compose music, I just recently had a film producer by one of my songs for their upcoming feature film. 

All of my extensive details are included here on my portfolio links and my Spotlight. 

IG: @seanhmclean 

https://linktr.ee/sean64550?utm_source=linktree_profile_share&ltsid=50331677-227f-402f-9028-e3c22ac4b2da

https://app.spotlight.com/0533-4506-9430

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Maayan, I’m a Los Angeles-based actress and a graduate of the Acting for Camera AOS program at AMDA.

I’m currently looking to connect with filmmakers, student directors, photographers, and creatives for upcoming projects, short films, and collaborations.

I’m bilingual (Hebrew/English), comfortable with both dramatic and comedic material, and always excited to work on meaningful and visually interesting projects.

Headshots/reel available upon request — would love to connect!

items.text:
Posting here to invite inquiries for class and coaching.  LPN Studios currently has space in group class, in-person in North Hollywood and online from anywhere in the world. 

Expert teachings, with a coach who has assisted transforming students into successful actors, in projects you've all seen streaming on TV and in movies in theaters. 

For info on those success stories (a few appear on this video) and more: www.laurenpatricenadlerstudios.com 

Lauren Patrice Nadler Studio's where the stars are always rising 🤩

For time sensitive coaching reach out at laurenpatricenadler@gmail.com
