items.text:
CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

---

CHASING SHADOWS (Chasing Shadows) - Pilot Episode

A crime/thriller online tv series that follows Astrid Clarke, an FBI agent torn between her family and her job when her brother joins a dangerous gang.

*LOCATION:*

Peterborough, UK

*CASTING REQUIREMENTS: ALL APPLICANTS HAVE TO BE 18+*

**Simon Clarke: **American accent. Visibly looks late twenties

**Classroom people/Park goers:** Anything goes. Open to all. We will try to fit in some improv discussions, but it will depend on what happens on the day with times.

*DATE & TIME:*

Current dates are **June 29th - July 1st**, but you would be needed for only one day, dependant on which character you are chosen for.

*PAYMENT & EXPENSES:*

**Unpaid, **as this is being funded personally. **Travel** will be **covered** **within** the **Peterborough** area **only**. Food is covered.

*CONTACT:*

Either DM me here, or email me at:

hannahlwalker02@hotmail.com

*OTHER IMPORTANT INFO:*

Simon’s character has a specific wardrobe, so Simon will need to be brought on board by June 10th at the VERY latest. June 1st ideally. Other characters by June 10th also, to allow script revision and prep time.

There are some T’s and C’s for Simon, but those can be discussed privately, such as character reappearances.

Thanks!

items.title: CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – ROMEO AND JULIET (Kathmandu Valley | Lambeth Fringe 2026) 🎭
We are casting local performers based in Nepal (Kathmandu Valley) for a bold new stage adaptation of Romeo and Juliet, heading to Lambeth Fringe 2026 (UK).

This is a contemporary, cross-cultural production that reimagines Shakespeare through movement, text, and grounded performance. We are looking for committed, expressive actors who are excited to work collaboratively and bring fresh energy to a classic story.

Roles available:

Romeo, Juliet, Mercutio, Tybalt, Friar Laurence, Nurse, and ensemble performers.

Location: Kathmandu Valley (rehearsals)

Festival: Lambeth Fringe 2026, London (UK tour)

Eligibility: Open to Nepal-based performers only

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and a short self-tape (1–2 minutes introducing yourself and/or performing Shakespeare) to:

yuensunyeefilms@gmail.com

Subject line: R&J Casting – [Your Name] – Role Applying For

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted with audition details.

A timeless story, retold from Kathmandu to London.

items.text: It’s casting call time!

sharedPost.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL: Be Part of a Story That Changes Eternities! 🚨
Are you ready to use your acting talent for a greater, divine purpose?

Church House Productions is casting for our upcoming powerful episode of The Rapture Chronicles. This isn’t just another film project—it is a visual wake-up call and a ministry tool designed to shake hearts, reach lost souls for Jesus, and open eyes to the distractions and traps of this world that pull people away from God.

We are bringing to life a breathtaking, cinematic illustration of just how fast the Rapture could happen. We need passionate individuals to help us deliver this urgent message!

🎬 ROLES AVAILABLE (Non-Paid Opportunity):
3 Female Leads (Diverse Races)

1 Male Supporting Role

Background Extras (20–30 participants needed to bring the chaotic, pivotal moments to life!)
Incentives: IMDb Credit for speaking roles and End Credits for all participants.
Filming Dates: Detroit, MI. Metro Area in Mid-June 2026.

⚡ "Your role is already written. Will you heed the warning?"
If you have a heart for ministry, a passion for the screen, and want to help us plant seeds of faith that will last for eternity, we want to see your audition!

📩 HOW TO APPLY:
Don't wait—time is of the essence. Email us at churchouseproductions22@gmail.com today to receive full details for video auditions. Please specify the role you are interested in within the email subject line.
Let's use the arts to win souls for the Kingdom. Apply now!

items.title: It’s casting call time!

items.text:
Reposting this so that everyone gets a chance to audition

DEADLINE: June 5th, 2026

CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting last two weekends of September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th)

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

WHO I'M LOOKING FOR:

XANDER, Male, 30s-40s The dad. Big presence, quiet intensity, carries a lot of weight he doesn't talk about. This is a physical role but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time, I want to meet you. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA , Female, 12-15 Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, open to the right person.

LORELEI , Female, 30s Xander's wife. She's got a prosthetic leg, wears a tool belt, and looks like someone who's kept a family alive through sheer will. Small role but she needs to feel real the second she's on screen. Open to everyone.

LILITH , Female, around 7 The little sister. She's got one line and a stuffed rabbit with one eye and she will absolutely steal the scene. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

YOUNG XANDER , Male, 8-11 A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

HELENE & ANORRA , Female, 8-12 each Two girls in the same flashback. They're ahead of Young Xander, picking through debris. Small roles but they help build the world. Open to all.

JACKSON , Male, 50s A farmer and trader who refuses to break even when things get very bad. He's got maybe five minutes of screen time and needs to make you feel everything. Open to all.

ELLEN (Jackson's Wife) , Female, 30s-40s Non-speaking. She died trying to protect her kid. The image says everything. You need to be comfortable with fake blood and staged death. Open to all.

JACKSON'S CHILDREN (x3) , Under 12 Also non-speaking. Same situation, this is heavy material and parents need to know that going in. Open to all.

BIONIC , Male, late 20s-40s The villain. Cybernetic arm, artificial eye, zero mercy. This role needs a separate prosthetic fitting before we shoot, plan for an extra session. If you want to play a genuinely scary person, this is your role. Open to all.

RAZOR , Male, late 20s-40s Bionic's partner and honestly the more terrifying of the two. Full metallic skull prosthetic, razor teeth, moves like something that used to be human. Full face appliance means a fitting session and extra time in the chair on shoot days. If you can commit to that and move like an animal, I want to talk. Open to all.

EXTRAS / BACKGROUND , Various ages Farmers, survivors, colony members. If you just want to be part of it, reach out. Open to all.

Heads up: This film has staged violence, fake blood, and some genuinely dark dramatic moments. Nothing unsafe happens on set, ever, but you should know what you're signing up for. For anyone under 18, a parent or guardian must be on set for the entire time; there are no exceptions.

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]

Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. Experience helps, but it's not what I'm looking for first. A reel is welcome if you have one.

topComments.text:
Interested.. sent you an Email. 
Thanks, 
Sam
Ooooh this sounds cool

items.text:
Hello all!

 

One of our actors had to leave our production due to recent health complications. We are currently looking for someone to replace the characters of Egeus/Philostrate. This role will be double cast as it's relatively small scene wise (roughly only in 2.5 scenes)

 

No specific gender or race requirements; would prefer a taller actor 5'8+ but not a dealbreaker if this doesn't apply. This is a community theatre volunteer role; actors and crew are NOT paid.

 

Location: Virginia Highlands, ATL 30306

 

**Current remaining rehearsal schedule **

**-T/Th 7-10pm**

**-Sat 10am-2pm**

**-Wed 6/3  7-10pm**

**-Fri 6/5 6-9pm**

 

**TECH **

**6/6-6/10 (NO Sunday rehearsal)**

 

**SHOWS **

**6/11-6/20**

**Thurs-Sat @8pm**

**Sun & 6/20 @2pm**

 

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit, please email our director/producer at the following

 

Info Renegade Theatre Co. <[info@renegadetheatreco.org](mailto:info@renegadetheatreco.org)>

 

Renegade Theatre <[renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com](mailto:renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com)>

items.text:
🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨
🚨!!CASTING NOTICE!!🚨

Hello! My name is Reve Hriczko. I'm an independent filmmaker with my own independent film studio called Two Fold Films. We are currently casting for our upcoming 2028 horror film titled "Camp Red Lake." Below I've attached posters detailing all information you could possibly need for your audition as well as the audition form! Filming will be between May-August of 2027 in the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. This is not paid work!! I'm very excited to work more on this project as it's been in the works for 2 years already.

Please share and audition! Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns. You may dm me, comment on this post, or email Twofoldfilmsofficial@gmail.com

We also post a lot on our instagram @twofoldfilmsofficial and you can dm us there as well.

I look forward to seeing everyone's auditions!

https://forms.gle/kUouZ3eddEpaj59w5

items.text:
Stagebugz Theatre is thrilled to announce **auditions for actors ages 18+ for our upcoming world-premiere production of *****Cryptophasia*****! **

**Audition Information**

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th. 

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)

**Dates**

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed****[ ****HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IZan_G4JGy2t60LuXnOE8it60DEbmZNzfAH0-9jTy4U/edit?usp=sharing)****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals. 

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit. 

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre. *

**Show Synopsis**

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand. 

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Breakdown**

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

 

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

 

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

 

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

 

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

**Production Team**

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

**About Us**

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects. 

For questions or to learn more, visit [[www.stagebugztheatre.com](www.stagebugztheatre.com)](http://www.stagebugztheatre.com) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

items.text:
Hi all! I'm a 41 year old journalism student based in Sheffield. I'm an ambulant wheelchair user (sometimes use it, sometimes don't) and am often in Hertfordshire and London and would love to do some extra work. I also have several miniature dachshunds who would be great for adverts etc. Pic of me and them attached.

I can also ride horses

sharedPost.text:
When you are about to do something great
Fear begins
It haunts you
It creates doubt
It plays with you.
Even so — take a step forward.

No artists.
No crew.
No experience.
"What I had — only this:
Passion. An idea. Confidence."
And the planning to execute it.
Put in the work.
Finally — ready to release my movie.

#reel #tollywood #AndhraPradesh #telugu #shortfilm

Ideal for aspiring or professional Child Actors 🎭

Help your child speak with confidence and clarity — the fun way! 🌟

🗓️ 6-Week Course starting Wednesday 3rd June 6:30pm-7pm
⏰ 30-Minute Sessions — perfect for young learners!
💻 Interactive online group format
💷 Only £60 for the full course!

Or Book 1:1 Classes for you child 🎉

items.text:
Alcohol Commercial Casting London
We are looking for stylish East Asian talents for an alcohol commercial shoot in London.

Chinese, Japanese and Korean talents are all welcome.

• Role

* Male 30+

* Real age must be 25+

* Good presence / stylish vibe preferred (similar to reference images)

* Motorcycle riding skills are a bonus

• Shoot Details

* London shoot

* Shooting window: Half day (4–5 hours) between June 8–12

* Fee: £500 all inclusive (usage included)

Please only apply if you are comfortable portraying alcohol appreciation during filming. Non-alcoholic drinks will be used on set.

Please only apply if you are comfortable with the included usage terms and fee.

Send headshot, spotlight link, showreels to:

[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

---

**酒类广告演员招募**

现招募气质较好的东亚裔演员出演酒类广告（伦敦拍摄）。

华裔、日本、韩国演员均可。

### 角色要求

*30+ 男性

* 真实法定年龄需25+

* 气质好、有质感（参考图风格）

* 会骑摩托加分

### 拍摄信息

* 伦敦拍摄

* 拍摄时间：6月8日–12日之间半天（4–5小时）

* 费用：£500 all inclusive（包含 usage）

请确认能够接受拍摄与酒类相关的表演内容后再申请。现场将使用无酒精饮品进行拍摄。

请确认接受 usage 条款及费用后再申请。

投递邮箱：

[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - LONDON**

We are looking for two people for a music visualiser:

*• Boy (8–13)*
*• Older man (65–85)*

The roles portray the same person at different stages of life, so we're particularly interested in finding people who may share similar features, expressions, or energy.

The film consists of a single, contemplative shot of the pair sitting together on a park bench overlooking a landscape.

No acting experience is necessary.

Paid role. 

Half day shoot in London, early June.

If interested, please send a recent photo, age, and a little bit about yourself via DM or email: oscar@oscarkeys.com

items.text:
✨ Every great actor started somewhere, and this is a pretty great place to start ✨
Our A-Z Theatrical Technique class is all about building real skills and growing into the actor you want to be! Whether you're brand new or just looking to sharpen your craft, this class covers TV & film audition technique from the ground up. 

Next session kicks off Thursday, 7/16! 🎭 Don't miss out: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#tv-and-film-audition-intensive 

#ActingClass #TheatricalActing #ActorsLife

Learn easy ways to break down material effectively. Master self-tape auditions & virtual auditions. Gain confidence to take adjustments overcome fears Become proficient and Book jobs with winning audition tapes. Final takes sent to industry professionals. items.text:
**KEY GRIP + GRIP TRUCK NEEDED — SHORT FILM (JUNE 18–20)** 

Hey gang! We’re currently looking for an experienced **Key Grip with a Grip Truck** for an upcoming **short film production** shooting **June 18th–20th**.

This project is **SHALOM SALAM: A RECIPE FOR PEACE** — a powerful and uplifting film about connection, humanity, and bridging divides through culture and community.

I’m incredibly proud to be part of this project alongside award-winning filmmakers **Bayou Bennett** and **Daniel Lir** of Dream Team Directors — a directing duo with **80+ international film awards** and over **16 years** of creating visually stunning, emotionally impactful films centered around humanity and connection.

 **Shalom Salam** tells the story of an Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneur who come together through food, technology, and community to inspire peace in a divided world.

 **Project Info:**
https://seedandspark.com/fund/shalom-salam-a-recipe-for-peace#story

**PROJECT DETAILS**
**Position:** Key Grip + Grip Truck
**Shoot Dates:** **June 18–20**
**Project Type:** Short Film
**Rate:** **$800–$900 Per Day** (depending on package/availability)
**Location:** Washington State
**Status:** Non-Union 

We’re looking for someone dependable, collaborative, and comfortable working on an indie narrative set. Grip truck package details and previous work/reel are appreciated when reaching out.

If interested, please send:
• Your experience/resume
• Grip truck package details
• Availability for the shoot dates
• Contact info

 **Contact:**
Henry Galliett
henrygalliett@gmail.com
425-623-5677

Please share with anyone who may be a good fit!
